metadata.title: Pricing
metadata.description: Choose a plan that brings peace and comfort to your heart
metadata.keywords: pricing, Bible video pricing, AI Bible video pricing, Christian video pricing, video credits, comfort video pricing

comparison.title: Compare plans before you buy
comparison.description: Each pricing option is designed for a different stage of use, from trying your first comfort video to creating and sharing many videos with family, friends, or church members.

items.title: Free Plan for first-time visitors
items.description: Start with 3 credits to experience the full video flow, test the output quality, and see how personalized Bible comfort videos fit your needs.

items.title: 20 Credits for occasional creation
items.description: Choose this option if you create videos now and then for prayer, encouragement, grief support, or special moments without committing to a larger pack.

items.title: 60 Credits for regular use and better value
items.description: This plan fits users who expect to create videos more often, need more flexibility, and want a lower effective price per video.

faq.title: Questions people ask before choosing a plan
faq.description: These answers clarify how credits work, whether they expire, and which plan makes sense based on how often you create videos.

items.question: Do my video credits expire?
items.answer: Paid credits do not expire, so you can use them whenever you need comfort, encouragement, or a faith-filled video to share.

items.question: Which plan is best if I only create videos occasionally?
items.answer: The 20 Credits plan is the best fit for occasional use because it gives you enough room to create meaningful videos without buying a larger package.

items.question: Why do people choose the 60 Credits plan?
items.answer: Many users choose 60 Credits because it lowers the effective price per video and makes it easier to create multiple videos for different moments, loved ones, or church needs.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.description: Create personalized Bible comfort videos that bring peace, warmth, and spiritual comfort to your heart. Choose the plan that fits your needs and start your journey of finding peace today.

items.title: Free Plan
items.description: Start your journey of finding peace and comfort. Perfect for trying out our service and experiencing the warmth of personalized Bible videos.
features: 3 credits granted to new users upon registration
items.tip: No credit card required. Start creating comfort videos today.

items.title: 20 Credits
items.description: Perfect for occasional use. Create meaningful Bible videos when you need comfort, peace, or want to express gratitude.
items.tip: One-time purchase. Credits never expire, use them whenever you need comfort.

items.title: 60 Credits
items.description: Most Popular - Best value for regular users. Create comfort videos regularly and share peace with loved ones.
items.label: Most Popular
features: Save 33% compared to buying 20 credits three times
Share videos with family and friends
items.tip: Best value! Save 33% and never worry about running out of credits.

messages.seo_tooltip_content: Our pricing is designed to provide value and peace of mind. We offer flexible credit-based plans that never expire, allowing you to create personalized Bible comfort videos whenever you need them. Our transparent pricing ensures you only pay for what you use, with no hidden fees or recurring subscriptions. Perfect for individuals and families seeking spiritual comfort and peace.
seo_body_paragraphs: The pricing page is designed to help visitors compare credit packages based on how often they expect to create comfort videos, prayer videos, or scripture-based content.
Some users only need a small number of credits for occasional encouragement videos, while others need more room to create multiple videos for family members, ministry work, or regular sharing.
The comparison and FAQ sections explain how credits are used, what each package is best suited for, and how to decide between a smaller plan and a higher-value option.
messages.seo_plan_summary: Current options on this page include {plans}, giving visitors a clear way to choose between first-time access, occasional creation, and more consistent video use.
